query: SELECT callType, COUNT(*) as count FROM calls_for_entries GROUP BY callType ORDER BY count DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Eu8qizdpHjVgc9.root --database 3ULjLoxa7T9u6LwkiqmLfY --execute SELECT callType, COUNT(*) as count FROM calls_for_entries GROUP BY callType ORDER BY count DESC
